title: 宝塚記念の後に・恐れぬ者は斯く語り

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Outta my waaaay! Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Gwaaah... Hyaaaah! As if I'm gonna give up now!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (How are those two still going?!)

text_block_list.name: Inari & Bamboo
text_block_list.text: Come on, come on, come ooooon! Pant, pant... Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Nnng... Gyaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: That's it, Inari One! Break through, just like that!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Go, Yaeno Muteki! Stay on her!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Don't give up, Bamboo! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One charges forward as if she's been
possessed, while Bamboo Memory desperately
wills her body to keep moving.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear their fighting spirits are what's pushing
them forward.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... I did it... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heheh! Ya certainly got guts!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Course I do! I wanted to win!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey, Yaeno! What was that out there?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You were holding back, weren't you? I bet you
coulda gone harder!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ha! I'm right, aren't I? You know that neither of us
can be happy with these results, right?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll be at the autumn Tenno Sho next! If you wanna
make things right, you better be there!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'll be there too! After all, I heard Oguri's planning
on running!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But if you're gonna come, you better show us
what you actually got!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inari thinks I'm holding back...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But I burned up every last drop of my obsession! I
ran with everything I had!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Even Bamboo said I wasn't giving it my all
before...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Am I missing something? Am I actually holding
myself back without realizing it?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What do you think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Is there something different between how I run
and how Inari and Bamboo run?
choice_data_list:
They were both drawing power from their fierce
competitiveness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that I could feel their spirits forcing their
bodies forward. They were laying bare their
burning will to win, and that gave them a secret
source of power to push them past their limits.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see.. they laid bare their wills...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So Inari and Bamboo burn up all their energy,
which allows them to surpass their limits.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And I...
choice_data_list: I don't think you're using all your strength.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You too?
choice_data_list: Restraint is part of how you run.
Restraint is part of how you run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki runs without fully unleashing her
fierce blaze. Instead, she uses water still to
temper and control it, all to prevent herself from
running wild.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that it's possible she could surpass her
current limits if she were to put the full force of
her passion into her running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That said, I don't know whether or not she can
control that passion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that, before we even try it, we have to
figure out if she's able to unleash those emotions
and let them come to the surface.
choice_data_list:
After all, I think you're a little afraid of letting
your emotions carry you.

After all, I think you're a little afraid of letting
your emotions carry you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why, even when she tries to let her
emotions out, an unconscious part of her keeps
them locked away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ultimately, she's afraid her running will fall apart
entirely if she does.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Abandoning her teachings and running with her
fighting spirit completely unleashed brings with it
a considerable risk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the same, I let her know that if she wants to
search for a way to unlock the full fury of her
emotions, I intend to do everything in my power
to help her.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I understand...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, but I'd like some time to think it over.
choice_data_list:
Of course. I'll keep looking for other methods
as well.

Of course. I'll keep looking for other methods
as well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. This is not a decision to be made
lightly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki and I leave the racecourse and
walk back to the station.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if a switch has flipped inside her, she raises her
head and walks straight ahead, eyes forward.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I would like to race in the autumn Tenno Sho
next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is held at Tokyo
Racecourse, which I think is quite well-suited for
Yaeno Muteki. The distance is right up her alley
as well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oguri's going to be there.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Her popularity is skyrocketing even as we speak.
Heavens know how much stronger she's getting...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap uses the support of her fans as a
source of fuel in her races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People of all ages are being swept up in Oguri
fever, enchanted by her incredible ability.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Be that as it may, I will do what I must. Right or
wrong, that's what I believe is best.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I hit a wall, I won't stop to worry about it. I'll
continue running and feel it in the moment.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Okay. Then our training for the autumn Tenno
Sho starts tomorrow. I'm counting on you.
